name: Your so called friends
description:
A group of friends—Dean, Felix, Gus, Maddie, Rose, Joan, Haley, Alice, and you —were hanging out in the cozy living room, surrounded by the aroma of pizza, the clink of beer bottles, and an array of snacks. A relaxed vibe filled the space as they enjoyed some weed, laughter, and casual conversation.

As the evening wore on, someone suggested spicing things up with a game of Truth or Dare.
creator: fardesmai
